name: aspdotnet
explanation: ASP.NET is collected via Windows Performance Counters (PDH) on the local host where the Agent runs. The spec uses `template: instances/perf_counters` and the check inherits `PerfCountersBaseCheckWithLegacySupport`. There is no remote host/port in the default mode — auto-config reduces to detecting whether ASP.NET (the `ASP.NET` / `ASP.NET Apps v*` perf-counter object set) is present on the Windows host and enabling the check with default counters. The optional `pdh_legacy` template can target a remote machine via username/password but is hidden in the spec.
notes: Pattern H (local Windows host detection), same shape as iis. Auto-config trigger is 'ASP.NET perf-counter object present on this machine', not a network probe.
